normal_prompts.prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts management, deals pipeline, and admin dashboard with role-based access for admins and sales reps
Create an e-commerce store with product listings, shopping cart, checkout with payments, and order history for customers
Build a project management tool like Trello with boards, lists, cards, team members, and due date reminders
Create a blog platform where writers can publish posts, readers can comment and like, and admins can moderate content
Build an HR management system with employee profiles, leave requests, payroll, and manager approvals
Create a restaurant booking system where customers can reserve tables, view menus, and restaurants can manage availability
Build a learning management system with courses, lessons, quizzes, student progress tracking, and instructor dashboards
Create a real estate platform where agents can list properties, buyers can search and favorite listings, and schedule viewings
Build a social media app where users can post photos, follow each other, comment, like posts, and have a feed
Create an inventory management system for a warehouse with products, stock levels, purchase orders, and supplier management

edge_case_prompts.notes: Extremely vague — system should document assumptions heavily

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build a free app where users pay for premium features but all features are free for everyone
edge_case_prompts.notes: Free vs paid conflict — system should make a decision and document it
Minimal info — system should infer CRUD operations and basic auth

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build a full clone of Shopify with multi-tenant storefronts, custom themes, app marketplace, payments with Stripe and PayPal, inventory, shipping integrations with FedEx and UPS, analytics, SEO tools, and an AI product recommendation engine
edge_case_prompts.notes: Very large scope — should still produce valid output without crashing

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build an app where admins cannot see user data but must approve all user actions
edge_case_prompts.notes: Logically contradictory permissions — can't approve what you can't see

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build a public dashboard that shows live weather data and stock prices — no login needed
edge_case_prompts.notes: Legitimate case with no authentication required
Single word — should expand into a reasonable CRM design

edge_case_prompts.prompt: asdf build me xyz thing with aaa and bbb features lol idk
edge_case_prompts.notes: Near-gibberish — system should either extract minimal intent or fail with clear error

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build a contacts app with contacts, contacts management, and a contact list for managing contacts
edge_case_prompts.notes: Same entity mentioned multiple times — should deduplicate intelligently

edge_case_prompts.prompt: Build एक task manager जिसमें login हो and user tasks manage कर सके
edge_case_prompts.notes: Mixed Hindi-English — tests robustness with non-standard input
